name: Microsoft Purview DLP
description: Integrates with Microsoft Purview Data Loss Prevention via Microsoft Graph Security API for DLP alert monitoring, policy management, and sensitive data governance

actions.name: List DLP Alerts
actions.description: Retrieve DLP alerts from Microsoft Purview through the Security API with filtering by severity, status, and date

parameters.name: $filter
parameters.description: OData filter expression (e.g., severity eq 'high' and serviceSource eq 'microsoftDataLossPrevention')

parameters.name: $top
parameters.description: Maximum number of alerts to return

parameters.name: $skip
parameters.description: Number of records to skip for pagination

actions.name: Get DLP Alert Details
actions.description: Retrieve detailed information about a specific DLP alert including matched sensitive information types

parameters.name: alertId
parameters.description: Unique identifier of the DLP alert

actions.name: Update DLP Alert
actions.description: Update the status, classification, or assigned-to properties of a DLP alert

parameters.name: alertId
parameters.description: Unique identifier of the DLP alert to update

parameters.name: assignedTo
parameters.description: User principal name to assign the alert to

parameters.name: comment
parameters.description: Comment to add to the alert

actions.name: List Sensitive Info Types
actions.description: Retrieve all sensitive information type definitions used by DLP policies

actions.name: Process Content
actions.description: Submit content for DLP policy evaluation to determine if protection actions are required

parameters.name: content
parameters.description: Text content to evaluate against DLP policies

actions.name: List Security Incidents
actions.description: Retrieve security incidents that may contain DLP-related alerts and evidence

parameters.name: $filter
parameters.description: OData filter expression for incident properties

parameters.name: $top
parameters.description: Maximum number of incidents to return
